Report full file contents and paths for all components you find.

I'm working in a shadcn/ui component library project. I need to understand how demo/example files are structured so I can create a demo for a new "Stepper" component.

Please explore:

1. Find the folder where examples/demos live (might be `registry/examples/`, `components/examples/`, `app/`, or similar)
2. Read the FULL contents of 2-3 example files for complex components (like Accordion demo, Tabs demo, or similar multi-state components)
3. Look at how demos are exported and named (naming conventions)
4. Check if there's a docs folder or app folder that shows how demos are rendered/displayed
5. Look for any story files or test files that might contain usage examples

Also check:
- Is there a specific format for demo files? (default export? named export?)
- Do demos use specific wrapper components?
- What imports do demos use - do they import from `@/components/ui/...` or local paths?

Report full file paths and full file contents for the examples you find.

1	import { mergeProps } from "@base-ui/react/merge-props"
2	import { useRender } from "@base-ui/react/use-render"
3	import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
4	
5	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
6	import { Separator } from "@/styles/base-nova/ui/separator"
7	
8	const buttonGroupVariants = cva(
9	  "flex w-fit items-stretch *:focus-visible:relative *:focus-visible:z-10 has-[>[data-slot=button-group]]:gap-2 has-[select[aria-hidden=true]:last-child]:[&>[data-slot=select-trigger]:last-of-type]:rounded-r-lg [&>[data-slot=select-trigger]:not([class*='w-'])]:w-fit [&>input]:flex-1",
10	  {
11	    variants: {
12	      orientation: {
13	        horizontal:
14	          "*:data-slot:rounded-r-none [&>[data-slot]:not(:has(~[data-slot]))]:rounded-r-lg! [&>[data-slot]~[data-slot]]:rounded-l-none [&>[data-slot]~[data-slot]]:border-l-0",
15	        vertical:
16	          "flex-col *:data-slot:rounded-b-none [&>[data-slot]:not(:has(~[data-slot]))]:rounded-b-lg! [&>[data-slot]~[data-slot]]:rounded-t-none [&>[data-slot]~[data-slot]]:border-t-0",
17	      },
18	    },
19	    defaultVariants: {
20	      orientation: "horizontal",
21	    },
22	  }
23	)
24	
25	function ButtonGroup({
26	  className,
27	  orientation,
28	  ...props
29	}: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & VariantProps<typeof buttonGroupVariants>) {
30	  return (
31	    <div
32	      role="group"
33	      data-slot="button-group"
34	      data-orientation={orientation}
35	      className={cn(buttonGroupVariants({ orientation }), className)}
36	      {...props}
37	    />
38	  )
39	}
40	
41	function ButtonGroupText({
42	  className,
43	  render,
44	  ...props
45	}: useRender.ComponentProps<"div">) {
46	  return useRender({
47	    defaultTagName: "div",
48	    props: mergeProps<"div">(
49	      {
50	        className: cn(
51	          "flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border bg-muted px-2.5 text-sm font-medium [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
52	          className
53	        ),
54	      },
55	      props
56	    ),
57	    render,
58	    state: {
59	      slot: "button-group-text",
60	    },
61	  })
62	}
63	
64	function ButtonGroupSeparator({
65	  className,
66	  orientation = "vertical",
67	  ...props
68	}: React.ComponentProps<typeof Separator>) {
69	  return (
70	    <Separator
71	      data-slot="button-group-separator"
72	      orientation={orientation}
73	      className={cn(
74	        "relative self-stretch bg-input data-horizontal:mx-px data-horizontal:w-auto data-vertical:my-px data-vertical:h-auto",
75	        className
76	      )}
77	      {...props}
78	    />
79	  )
80	}
81	
82	export {
83	  ButtonGroup,
84	  ButtonGroupSeparator,
85	  ButtonGroupText,
86	  buttonGroupVariants,
87	}

3	import * as React from "react"
4	import { Toggle as TogglePrimitive } from "@base-ui/react/toggle"
5	import { ToggleGroup as ToggleGroupPrimitive } from "@base-ui/react/toggle-group"
6	import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
7	
8	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
9	import { toggleVariants } from "@/styles/base-nova/ui/toggle"
10	
11	const ToggleGroupContext = React.createContext<
12	  VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants> & {
13	    spacing?: number
14	    orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical"
15	  }
16	>({
17	  size: "default",
18	  variant: "default",
19	  spacing: 0,
20	  orientation: "horizontal",
21	})
22	
23	function ToggleGroup({
24	  className,
25	  variant,
26	  size,
27	  spacing = 0,
28	  orientation = "horizontal",
29	  children,
30	  ...props
31	}: ToggleGroupPrimitive.Props &
32	  VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants> & {
33	    spacing?: number
34	    orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical"
35	  }) {
36	  return (
37	    <ToggleGroupPrimitive
38	      data-slot="toggle-group"
39	      data-variant={variant}
40	      data-size={size}
41	      data-spacing={spacing}
42	      data-orientation={orientation}
43	      style={{ "--gap": spacing } as React.CSSProperties}
44	      className={cn(
45	        "group/toggle-group flex w-fit flex-row items-center gap-[--spacing(var(--gap))] rounded-lg data-[size=sm]:rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] data-vertical:flex-col data-vertical:items-stretch",
46	        className
47	      )}
48	      {...props}
49	    >
50	      <ToggleGroupContext.Provider
51	        value={{ variant, size, spacing, orientation }}
52	      >
53	        {children}
54	      </ToggleGroupContext.Provider>
55	    </ToggleGroupPrimitive>
56	  )
57	}
58	
59	function ToggleGroupItem({
60	  className,
61	  children,
62	  variant = "default",
63	  size = "default",
64	  ...props
65	}: TogglePrimitive.Props & VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
66	  const context = React.useContext(ToggleGroupContext)
67	
68	  return (
69	    <TogglePrimitive
70	      data-slot="toggle-group-item"
71	      data-variant={context.variant || variant}
72	      data-size={context.size || size}
73	      data-spacing={context.spacing}
74	      className={cn(
75	        "shrink-0 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:rounded-none group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:px-2 focus:z-10 focus-visible:z-10 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 group-data-[spacing=0]/toggle-group:has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:first:rounded-l-lg group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:first:rounded-t-lg group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:last:rounded-r-lg group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:last:rounded-b-lg group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:border-l-0 group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:border-t-0 group-data-horizontal/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:first:border-l group-data-vertical/toggle-group:data-[spacing=0]:data-[variant=outline]:first:border-t",
76	        toggleVariants({
77	          variant: context.variant || variant,
78	          size: context.size || size,
79	        }),
80	        className
81	      )}
82	      {...props}
83	    >
84	      {children}
85	    </TogglePrimitive>
86	  )
87	}
88	
89	export { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem }

2	title: Examples
3	description: "Examples of registry items: styles, components, css vars, etc."
4	---
5	
6	## registry:style
7	
8	### Custom style that extends shadcn/ui
9	
10	The following registry item is a custom style that extends shadcn/ui. On `npx shadcn init`, it will:
11	
12	- Install `@tabler/icons-react` as a dependency.
13	- Add the `login-01` block and `calendar` component to the project.
14	- Add the `editor` from a remote registry.
15	- Set the `font-sans` variable to `Inter, sans-serif`.
16	- Install a `brand` color in light and dark mode.
17	
18	```json title="example-style.json" showLineNumbers
19	{
20	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
21	  "name": "example-style",
22	  "type": "registry:style",
23	  "dependencies": ["@tabler/icons-react"],
24	  "registryDependencies": [
25	    "login-01",
26	    "calendar",
27	    "https://example.com/r/editor.json"
28	  ],
29	  "cssVars": {
30	    "theme": {
31	      "font-sans": "Inter, sans-serif"
32	    },
33	    "light": {
34	      "brand": "20 14.3% 4.1%"
35	    },
36	    "dark": {
37	      "brand": "20 14.3% 4.1%"
38	    }
39	  }
40	}
41	```
42	
43	### Custom style from scratch
44	
45	The following registry item is a custom style that doesn't extend shadcn/ui. See the `extends: none` field.
46	
47	It can be used to create a new style from scratch, i.e. custom components, css vars, dependencies, etc.
48	
49	On `npx shadcn add`, the following will:
50	
51	- Install `tailwind-merge` and `clsx` as dependencies.
52	- Add the `utils` registry item from the shadcn/ui registry.
53	- Add the `button`, `input`, `label`, and `select` components from a remote registry.
54	- Install new css vars: `main`, `bg`, `border`, `text`, `ring`.
55	
56	```json title="example-style.json" showLineNumbers
57	{
58	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
59	  "extends": "none",
60	  "name": "new-style",
61	  "type": "registry:style",
62	  "dependencies": ["tailwind-merge", "clsx"],
63	  "registryDependencies": [
64	    "utils",
65	    "https://example.com/r/button.json",
66	    "https://example.com/r/input.json",
67	    "https://example.com/r/label.json",
68	    "https://example.com/r/select.json"
69	  ],
70	  "cssVars": {
71	    "theme": {
72	      "font-sans": "Inter, sans-serif"
73	    },
74	    "light": {
75	      "main": "#88aaee",
76	      "bg": "#dfe5f2",
77	      "border": "#000",
78	      "text": "#000",
79	      "ring": "#000"
80	    },
81	    "dark": {
82	      "main": "#88aaee",
83	      "bg": "#272933",
84	      "border": "#000",
85	      "text": "#e6e6e6",
86	      "ring": "#fff"
87	    }
88	  }
89	}
90	```

145	
146	## registry:block
147	
148	### Custom block
149	
150	This block installs the `login-01` block from the shadcn/ui registry.
151	
152	```json title="login-01.json" showLineNumbers
153	{
154	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
155	  "name": "login-01",
156	  "type": "registry:block",
157	  "description": "A simple login form.",
158	  "registryDependencies": ["button", "card", "input", "label"],
159	  "files": [
160	    {
161	      "path": "blocks/login-01/page.tsx",
162	      "content": "import { LoginForm } ...",
163	      "type": "registry:page",
164	      "target": "app/login/page.tsx"
165	    },
166	    {
167	      "path": "blocks/login-01/components/login-form.tsx",
168	      "content": "...",
169	      "type": "registry:component"
170	    }
171	  ]
172	}
173	```
174	
175	### Install a block and override primitives
176	
177	You can install a block from the shadcn/ui registry and override the primitives using your custom ones.
178	
179	On `npx shadcn add`, the following will:
180	
181	- Add the `login-01` block from the shadcn/ui registry.
182	- Override the `button`, `input`, and `label` primitives with the ones from the remote registry.
183	
184	```json title="example-style.json" showLineNumbers
185	{
186	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
187	  "name": "custom-login",
188	  "type": "registry:block",
189	  "registryDependencies": [
190	    "login-01",
191	    "https://example.com/r/button.json",
192	    "https://example.com/r/input.json",
193	    "https://example.com/r/label.json"
194	  ]
195	}
196	```
197	
198	## registry:ui
199	
200	### UI component
201	
202	A `registry:ui` item is a reusable UI component. It can have dependencies, registry dependencies, and CSS variables.
203	
204	```json title="button.json" showLineNumbers
205	{
206	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
207	  "name": "button",
208	  "type": "registry:ui",
209	  "dependencies": ["radix-ui"],
210	  "files": [
211	    {
212	      "path": "ui/button.tsx",
213	      "content": "...",
214	      "type": "registry:ui"
215	    }
216	  ]
217	}
218	```
219	
220	### UI component with CSS variables
221	
222	```json title="sidebar.json" showLineNumbers
223	{
224	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
225	  "name": "sidebar",
226	  "type": "registry:ui",
227	  "dependencies": ["radix-ui"],
228	  "registryDependencies": ["button", "separator", "sheet", "tooltip"],
229	  "files": [
230	    {
231	      "path": "ui/sidebar.tsx",
232	      "content": "...",
233	      "type": "registry:ui"
234	    }
235	  ],
236	  "cssVars": {
237	    "light": {
238	      "sidebar-background": "oklch(0.985 0 0)",
239	      "sidebar-foreground": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)",
240	      "sidebar-border": "oklch(0.92 0.004 286.32)"
241	    },
242	    "dark": {
243	      "sidebar-background": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)",
244	      "sidebar-foreground": "oklch(0.985 0 0)",
245	      "sidebar-border": "oklch(0.274 0.006 286.033)"
246	    }
247	  }
248	}
249	```
250	
251	## registry:lib
252	
253	### Utility library
254	
255	A `registry:lib` item is a utility library. Use it to share helper functions, constants, or other non-component code.
256	
257	```json title="utils.json" showLineNumbers
258	{
259	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
260	  "name": "utils",
261	  "type": "registry:lib",
262	  "dependencies": ["clsx", "tailwind-merge"],
263	  "files": [
264	    {
265	      "path": "lib/utils.ts",
266	      "content": "import { clsx, type ClassValue } from \"clsx\"\nimport { twMerge } from \"tailwind-merge\"\n\nexport function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {\n  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))\n}",
267	      "type": "registry:lib"
268	    }
269	  ]
270	}
271	```
272	
273	## registry:hook
274	
275	### Custom hook
276	
277	A `registry:hook` item is a custom React hook.
278	
279	```json title="use-mobile.json" showLineNumbers
280	{
281	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
282	  "name": "use-mobile",
283	  "type": "registry:hook",
284	  "files": [
285	    {
286	      "path": "hooks/use-mobile.ts",
287	      "content": "...",
288	      "type": "registry:hook"
289	    }
290	  ]
291	}
292	```
293	
294	### Hook with dependencies
295	
296	```json title="use-debounce.json" showLineNumbers
297	{
298	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
299	  "name": "use-debounce",
300	  "type": "registry:hook",
301	  "dependencies": ["react"],
302	  "files": [
303	    {
304	      "path": "hooks/use-debounce.ts",
305	      "content": "...",
306	      "type": "registry:hook"
307	    }
308	  ]
309	}
310	```
311	
312	## registry:font
313	
314	### Custom font
315	
316	A `registry:font` item installs a Google Font. The `font` field is required and configures the font family, provider, import name, and CSS variable.
317	
318	```json title="font-inter.json" showLineNumbers
319	{
320	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
321	  "name": "font-inter",
322	  "type": "registry:font",
323	  "font": {
324	    "family": "'Inter Variable', sans-serif",
325	    "provider": "google",
326	    "import": "Inter",
327	    "variable": "--font-sans",
328	    "subsets": ["latin"],
329	    "dependency": "@fontsource-variable/inter"
330	  }
331	}
332	```
333	
334	### Monospace font
335	
336	```json title="font-jetbrains-mono.json" showLineNumbers
337	{
338	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
339	  "name": "font-jetbrains-mono",
340	  "type": "registry:font",
341	  "font": {
342	    "family": "'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace",
343	    "provider": "google",
344	    "import": "JetBrains_Mono",
345	    "variable": "--font-mono",
346	    "weight": ["400", "500", "600", "700"],
347	    "subsets": ["latin"],
348	    "dependency": "@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono"
349	  }
350	}
351	```
352	
353	### Serif font
354	
355	```json title="font-lora.json" showLineNumbers
356	{
357	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
358	  "name": "font-lora",
359	  "type": "registry:font",
360	  "font": {
361	    "family": "'Lora Variable', serif",
362	    "provider": "google",
363	    "import": "Lora",
364	    "variable": "--font-serif",
365	    "subsets": ["latin"],
366	    "dependency": "@fontsource-variable/lora"
367	  }
368	}
369	```
370	
371	### Font with custom selector
372	
373	Use the `selector` field to apply a font to specific CSS selectors instead of globally on `html`. This is useful for heading fonts or other targeted font applications.
374	
375	```json title="font-playfair-display.json" showLineNumbers
376	{
377	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
378	  "name": "font-playfair-display",
379	  "type": "registry:font",
380	  "font": {
381	    "family": "'Playfair Display Variable', serif",
382	    "provider": "google",
383	    "import": "Playfair_Display",
384	    "variable": "--font-heading",
385	    "subsets": ["latin"],
386	    "selector": "h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6",
387	    "dependency": "@fontsource-variable/playfair-display"
388	  }
389	}
390	```
391	
392	When `selector` is set, the font utility class (e.g. `font-heading`) is applied via CSS `@apply` on the specified selector within `@layer base`, instead of being added to the `<html>` element. The CSS variable is still injected on `<html>` so it's available globally.
393	
394	## registry:base
395	
396	### Custom base
397	
398	A `registry:base` item is a complete design system base. It defines the full set of dependencies, CSS variables, and configuration for a project. The `config` field is unique to `registry:base` items.
399	
400	The `config` field accepts the following properties (all optional):
401	
402	| Property             | Type                                                                         | Description                                                     |
403	| -------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
404	| `style`              | `string`                                                                     | The style name for the base.                                    |
405	| `iconLibrary`        | `string`                                                                     | The icon library to use (e.g. `lucide`).                        |
406	| `rsc`                | `boolean`                                                                    | Whether to enable React Server Components. Defaults to `false`. |
407	| `tsx`                | `boolean`                                                                    | Whether to use TypeScript. Defaults to `true`.                  |
408	| `rtl`                | `boolean`                                                                    | Whether to enable right-to-left support. Defaults to `false`.   |
409	| `menuColor`          | `"default" \| "inverted" \| "default-translucent" \| "inverted-translucent"` | The menu color scheme. Defaults to `"default"`.                 |
410	| `menuAccent`         | `"subtle" \| "bold"`                                                         | The menu accent style. Defaults to `"subtle"`.                  |
411	| `tailwind.baseColor` | `string`                                                                     | The base color name (e.g. `neutral`, `slate`, `zinc`).          |
412	| `tailwind.css`       | `string`                                                                     | Path to the Tailwind CSS file.                                  |
413	| `tailwind.prefix`    | `string`                                                                     | A prefix to add to all Tailwind classes.                        |
414	| `aliases.components` | `string`                                                                     | Import alias for components.                                    |
415	| `aliases.utils`      | `string`                                                                     | Import alias for utilities.                                     |
416	| `aliases.ui`         | `string`                                                                     | Import alias for UI components.                                 |
417	| `aliases.lib`        | `string`                                                                     | Import alias for lib.                                           |
418	| `aliases.hooks`      | `string`                                                                     | Import alias for hooks.                                         |
419	| `registries`         | `Record<string, string \| object>`                                           | Custom registry URLs. Keys must start with `@`.                 |
420	
421	```json title="custom-base.json" showLineNumbers
422	{
423	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
424	  "name": "custom-base",
425	  "type": "registry:base",
426	  "config": {
427	    "style": "custom-base",
428	    "iconLibrary": "lucide",
429	    "tailwind": {
430	      "baseColor": "neutral"
431	    }
432	  },
433	  "dependencies": [
434	    "class-variance-authority",
435	    "tw-animate-css",
436	    "lucide-react"
437	  ],
438	  "registryDependencies": ["utils", "font-inter"],
439	  "cssVars": {
440	    "light": {
441	      "background": "oklch(1 0 0)",
442	      "foreground": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)",
443	      "primary": "oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885)",
444	      "primary-foreground": "oklch(0.985 0 0)"
445	    },
446	    "dark": {
447	      "background": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)",
448	      "foreground": "oklch(0.985 0 0)",
449	      "primary": "oklch(0.985 0 0)",
450	      "primary-foreground": "oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885)"
451	    }
452	  },
453	  "css": {
454	    "@import \"tw-animate-css\"": {},
455	    "@layer base": {
456	      "*": {
457	        "@apply border-border outline-ring/50": {}
458	      },
459	      "body": {
460	        "@apply bg-background text-foreground": {}
461	      }
462	    }
463	  }
464	}
465	```
466	
467	### Base from scratch
468	
469	Use `extends: none` to create a base that doesn't extend shadcn/ui defaults.
470	
471	```json title="custom-base.json" showLineNumbers
472	{
473	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
474	  "name": "my-design-system",
475	  "extends": "none",
476	  "type": "registry:base",
477	  "config": {
478	    "style": "my-design-system",
479	    "iconLibrary": "lucide",
480	    "tailwind": {
481	      "baseColor": "slate"
482	    }
483	  },
484	  "dependencies": ["tailwind-merge", "clsx", "tw-animate-css", "lucide-react"],
485	  "registryDependencies": ["utils", "font-geist"],
486	  "cssVars": {
487	    "light": {
488	      "background": "oklch(1 0 0)",
489	      "foreground": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)"
490	    },
491	    "dark": {
492	      "background": "oklch(0.141 0.005 285.823)",
493	      "foreground": "oklch(0.985 0 0)"
494	    }
495	  }
496	}
497	```
498	
499	## Common Fields
500	
501	### Author
502	
503	Use the `author` field to add attribution to your registry items.
504	
505	```json title="example-item.json" showLineNumbers {5}
506	{
507	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
508	  "name": "custom-component",
509	  "type": "registry:ui",
510	  "author": "shadcn",
511	  "files": [
512	    {
513	      "path": "ui/custom-component.tsx",
514	      "content": "...",
515	      "type": "registry:ui"
516	    }
517	  ]
518	}
519	```
520	
521	### Dev dependencies
522	
523	Use the `devDependencies` field to install packages as dev dependencies.
524	
525	```json title="example-item.json" showLineNumbers {5}
526	{
527	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
528	  "name": "custom-item",
529	  "type": "registry:item",
530	  "devDependencies": ["@types/mdx"],
531	  "files": [
532	    {
533	      "path": "lib/mdx.ts",
534	      "content": "...",
535	      "type": "registry:lib"
536	    }
537	  ]
538	}
539	```
540	
541	### Metadata
542	
543	Use the `meta` field to attach arbitrary metadata to your registry items. This can be used to store custom data that your tools or scripts can use.
544	
545	```json title="example-item.json" showLineNumbers {5-8}
546	{
547	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
548	  "name": "custom-component",
549	  "type": "registry:ui",
550	  "meta": {
551	    "category": "forms",
552	    "version": "2.0.0"
553	  },
554	  "files": [
555	    {
556	      "path": "ui/custom-component.tsx",
557	      "content": "...",
558	      "type": "registry:ui"
559	    }
560	  ]
561	}
562	```
563	
564	## CSS Variables
565	
566	### Custom Theme Variables
567	
568	Add custom theme variables to the `theme` object.
569	
570	```json title="example-theme.json" showLineNumbers
571	{
572	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
573	  "name": "custom-theme",
574	  "type": "registry:theme",
575	  "cssVars": {
576	    "theme": {
577	      "font-heading": "Inter, sans-serif",
578	      "shadow-card": "0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)"
579	    }
580	  }
581	}
582	```
583	
584	### Override Tailwind CSS variables
585	
586	```json title="example-theme.json" showLineNumbers
587	{
588	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
589	  "name": "custom-theme",
590	  "type": "registry:theme",
591	  "cssVars": {
592	    "theme": {
593	      "spacing": "0.2rem",
594	      "breakpoint-sm": "640px",
595	      "breakpoint-md": "768px",
596	      "breakpoint-lg": "1024px",
597	      "breakpoint-xl": "1280px",
598	      "breakpoint-2xl": "1536px"
599	    }
600	  }
601	}
602	```
603	
604	## Add custom CSS
605	
606	### Base styles
607	
608	```json title="example-base.json" showLineNumbers
609	{
610	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
611	  "name": "custom-style",
612	  "type": "registry:style",
613	  "css": {
614	    "@layer base": {
615	      "h1": {
616	        "font-size": "var(--text-2xl)"
617	      },
618	      "h2": {
619	        "font-size": "var(--text-xl)"
620	      }
621	    }
622	  }
623	}
624	```
625	
626	### Components
627	
628	```json title="example-card.json" showLineNumbers
629	{
630	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
631	  "name": "custom-card",
632	  "type": "registry:component",
633	  "css": {
634	    "@layer components": {
635	      "card": {
636	        "background-color": "var(--color-white)",
637	        "border-radius": "var(--rounded-lg)",
638	        "padding": "var(--spacing-6)",
639	        "box-shadow": "var(--shadow-xl)"
640	      }
641	    }
642	  }
643	}
644	```
645	
646	## Add custom utilities
647	
648	### Simple utility
649	
650	```json title="example-component.json" showLineNumbers
651	{
652	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
653	  "name": "custom-component",
654	  "type": "registry:component",
655	  "css": {
656	    "@utility content-auto": {
657	      "content-visibility": "auto"
658	    }
659	  }
660	}
661	```
662	
663	### Complex utility
664	
665	```json title="example-utility.json" showLineNumbers
666	{
667	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
668	  "name": "custom-component",
669	  "type": "registry:component",
670	  "css": {
671	    "@utility scrollbar-hidden": {
672	      "scrollbar-hidden": {
673	        "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
674	          "display": "none"
675	        }
676	      }
677	    }
678	  }
679	}
680	```
681	
682	### Functional utilities
683	
684	```json title="example-functional.json" showLineNumbers
685	{
686	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
687	  "name": "custom-component",
688	  "type": "registry:component",
689	  "css": {
690	    "@utility tab-*": {
691	      "tab-size": "var(--tab-size-*)"
692	    }
693	  }
694	}
695	```
696	
697	## Add CSS imports
698	
699	Use `@import` to add CSS imports to your registry item. The imports will be placed at the top of the CSS file.
700	
701	### Basic import
702	
703	```json title="example-import.json" showLineNumbers
704	{
705	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
706	  "name": "custom-import",
707	  "type": "registry:component",
708	  "css": {
709	    "@import \"tailwindcss\"": {},
710	    "@import \"./styles/base.css\"": {}
711	  }
712	}
713	```
714	
715	### Import with url() syntax
716	
717	```json title="example-url-import.json" showLineNumbers
718	{
719	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
720	  "name": "font-import",
721	  "type": "registry:item",
722	  "css": {
723	    "@import url(\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap\")": {},
724	    "@import url('./local-styles.css')": {}
725	  }
726	}
727	```
728	
729	### Import with media queries
730	
731	```json title="example-media-import.json" showLineNumbers
732	{
733	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
734	  "name": "responsive-import",
735	  "type": "registry:item",
736	  "css": {
737	    "@import \"print-styles.css\" print": {},
738	    "@import url(\"mobile.css\") screen and (max-width: 768px)": {}
739	  }
740	}
741	```
742	
743	## Add custom plugins
744	
745	Use `@plugin` to add Tailwind plugins to your registry item. Plugins will be automatically placed after imports and before other content.
746	
747	**Important:** When using plugins from npm packages, you must also add them to the `dependencies` array.
748	
749	### Basic plugin usage
750	
751	```json title="example-plugin.json" showLineNumbers
752	{
753	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
754	  "name": "custom-plugin",
755	  "type": "registry:item",
756	  "css": {
757	    "@plugin \"@tailwindcss/typography\"": {},
758	    "@plugin \"foo\"": {}
759	  }
760	}
761	```
762	
763	### Plugin with npm dependency
764	
765	When using plugins from npm packages like `@tailwindcss/typography`, include them in the dependencies.
766	
767	```json title="example-typography.json" showLineNumbers
768	{
769	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
770	  "name": "typography-component",
771	  "type": "registry:item",
772	  "dependencies": ["@tailwindcss/typography"],
773	  "css": {
774	    "@plugin \"@tailwindcss/typography\"": {},
775	    "@layer components": {
776	      ".prose": {
777	        "max-width": "65ch"
778	      }
779	    }
780	  }
781	}
782	```
783	
784	### Scoped and file-based plugins
785	
786	```json title="example-scoped-plugin.json" showLineNumbers
787	{
788	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
789	  "name": "scoped-plugins",
790	  "type": "registry:component",
791	  "css": {
792	    "@plugin \"@headlessui/tailwindcss\"": {},
793	    "@plugin \"tailwindcss/plugin\"": {},
794	    "@plugin \"./custom-plugin.js\"": {}
795	  }
796	}
797	```
798	
799	### Multiple plugins with automatic ordering
800	
801	When you add multiple plugins, they are automatically grouped together and deduplicated.
802	
803	```json title="example-multiple-plugins.json" showLineNumbers
804	{
805	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
806	  "name": "multiple-plugins",
807	  "type": "registry:item",
808	  "dependencies": [
809	    "@tailwindcss/typography",
810	    "@tailwindcss/forms",
811	    "tw-animate-css"
812	  ],
813	  "css": {
814	    "@plugin \"@tailwindcss/typography\"": {},
815	    "@plugin \"@tailwindcss/forms\"": {},
816	    "@plugin \"tw-animate-css\"": {}
817	  }
818	}
819	```
820	
821	## Combined imports and plugins
822	
823	When using both `@import` and `@plugin` directives, imports are placed first, followed by plugins, then other CSS content.
824	
825	```json title="example-combined.json" showLineNumbers
826	{
827	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
828	  "name": "combined-example",
829	  "type": "registry:item",
830	  "dependencies": ["@tailwindcss/typography", "tw-animate-css"],
831	  "css": {
832	    "@import \"tailwindcss\"": {},
833	    "@import url(\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap\")": {},
834	    "@plugin \"@tailwindcss/typography\"": {},
835	    "@plugin \"tw-animate-css\"": {},
836	    "@layer base": {
837	      "body": {
838	        "font-family": "Inter, sans-serif"
839	      }
840	    },
841	    "@utility content-auto": {
842	      "content-visibility": "auto"
843	    }
844	  }
845	}
846	```
847	
848	## Add custom animations
849	
850	Note: you need to define both `@keyframes` in css and `theme` in cssVars to use animations.
851	
852	```json title="example-component.json" showLineNumbers
853	{
854	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
855	  "name": "custom-component",
856	  "type": "registry:component",
857	  "cssVars": {
858	    "theme": {
859	      "--animate-wiggle": "wiggle 1s ease-in-out infinite"
860	    }
861	  },
862	  "css": {
863	    "@keyframes wiggle": {
864	      "0%, 100%": {
865	        "transform": "rotate(-3deg)"
866	      },
867	      "50%": {
868	        "transform": "rotate(3deg)"
869	      }
870	    }
871	  }
872	}
873	```
874	
875	## Add environment variables
876	
877	You can add environment variables using the `envVars` field.
878	
879	```json title="example-item.json" showLineNumbers {5-9}
880	{
881	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
882	  "name": "custom-item",
883	  "type": "registry:item",
884	  "envVars": {
885	    "NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL": "http://localhost:4000",
886	    "DATABASE_URL": "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres",
887	    "OPENAI_API_KEY": ""
888	  }
889	}
890	```
891	
892	Environment variables are added to the `.env.local` or `.env` file. Existing variables are not overwritten.
893	
894	<Callout>
895	
896	**IMPORTANT:** Use `envVars` to add development or example variables. Do NOT use it to add production variables.
897	
898	</Callout>
899	
900	## Universal Items
901	
902	As of `2.9.0`, you can create universal items that can be installed without framework detection or components.json.
903	
904	To make an item universal i.e framework agnostic, all the files in the item must have an explicit target.
905	
906	Here's an example of a registry item that installs custom Cursor rules for _python_:
907	
908	```json title=".cursor/rules/custom-python.mdc" showLineNumbers {9}
909	{
910	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
911	  "name": "python-rules",
912	  "type": "registry:item",
913	  "files": [
914	    {
915	      "path": "/path/to/your/registry/default/custom-python.mdc",
916	      "type": "registry:file",
917	      "target": "~/.cursor/rules/custom-python.mdc",
918	      "content": "..."
919	    }
920	  ]
921	}
922	```
923	
924	Here's another example for installing a custom ESLint config:
925	
926	```json title=".eslintrc.json" showLineNumbers {9}
927	{
928	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
929	  "name": "my-eslint-config",
930	  "type": "registry:item",
931	  "files": [
932	    {
933	      "path": "/path/to/your/registry/default/custom-eslint.json",
934	      "type": "registry:file",
935	      "target": "~/.eslintrc.json",
936	      "content": "..."
937	    }
938	  ]
939	}
940	```
941	
942	You can also have a universal item that installs multiple files:
943	
944	```json title="my-custom-starter-template.json" showLineNumbers {9}
945	{
946	  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
947	  "name": "my-custom-starter-template",
948	  "type": "registry:item",
949	  "dependencies": ["better-auth"],
950	  "files": [
951	    {
952	      "path": "/path/to/file-01.json",
953	      "type": "registry:file",
954	      "target": "~/file-01.json",
955	      "content": "..."
956	    },
957	    {
958	      "path": "/path/to/file-02.vue",
959	      "type": "registry:file",
960	      "target": "~/pages/file-02.vue",
961	      "content": "..."
962	    }
963	  ]
964	}
965	```
966

29	
30	function Toggle({
31	  className,
32	  variant = "default",
33	  size = "default",
34	  ...props
35	}: TogglePrimitive.Props & VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {

48	  size = "default",

54	      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
55	      {...props}

1	import { z } from "zod"

3	// Note: if you edit the schema here, you must also edit the schema in the
4	// apps/v4/public/schema/registry-item.json file.
5	
6	export const registryConfigItemSchema = z.union([
7	  // Simple string format: "https://example.com/{name}.json"
8	  z.string().refine((s) => s.includes("{name}"), {
9	    message: "Registry URL must include {name} placeholder",
10	  }),
11	  // Advanced object format with auth options
12	  z.object({
13	    url: z.string().refine((s) => s.includes("{name}"), {
14	      message: "Registry URL must include {name} placeholder",
15	    }),
16	    params: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
17	    headers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
18	  }),
19	])
20	
21	export const registryConfigSchema = z.record(
22	  z.string().refine((key) => key.startsWith("@"), {
23	    message: "Registry names must start with @ (e.g., @v0, @acme)",
24	  }),
25	  registryConfigItemSchema
26	)
27	
28	export const rawConfigSchema = z
29	  .object({
30	    $schema: z.string().optional(),
31	    style: z.string(),
32	    rsc: z.coerce.boolean().default(false),
33	    tsx: z.coerce.boolean().default(true),
34	    tailwind: z.object({
35	      config: z.string().optional(),
36	      css: z.string(),
37	      baseColor: z.string(),
38	      cssVariables: z.boolean().default(true),
39	      prefix: z.string().default("").optional(),
40	    }),
41	    iconLibrary: z.string().optional(),
42	    rtl: z.coerce.boolean().default(false).optional(),
43	    menuColor: z
44	      .enum([
45	        "default",
46	        "inverted",
47	        "default-translucent",
48	        "inverted-translucent",
49	      ])
50	      .default("default")
51	      .optional(),
52	    menuAccent: z.enum(["subtle", "bold"]).default("subtle").optional(),
53	    aliases: z.object({
54	      components: z.string(),
55	      utils: z.string(),
56	      ui: z.string().optional(),
57	      lib: z.string().optional(),
58	      hooks: z.string().optional(),
59	    }),
60	    registries: registryConfigSchema.optional(),
61	  })
62	  .strict()
63	
64	export const configSchema = rawConfigSchema.extend({
65	  resolvedPaths: z.object({

76	
77	// TODO: type the key.

80	
81	export const registryItemTypeSchema = z.enum([
82	  "registry:lib",
83	  "registry:block",
84	  "registry:component",
85	  "registry:ui",
86	  "registry:hook",
87	  "registry:page",
88	  "registry:file",
89	  "registry:theme",
90	  "registry:style",
91	  "registry:item",
92	  "registry:base",
93	  "registry:font",
94	
95	  // Internal use only.
96	  "registry:example",
97	  "registry:internal",
98	])
99	
100	export const registryItemFileSchema = z.discriminatedUnion("type", [
101	  // Target is required for registry:file and registry:page
102	  z.object({
103	    path: z.string(),
104	    content: z.string().optional(),
105	    type: z.enum(["registry:file", "registry:page"]),
106	    target: z.string(),
107	  }),
108	  z.object({
109	    path: z.string(),

114	])
115	
116	export const registryItemTailwindSchema = z.object({
117	  config: z
118	    .object({
119	      content: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
120	      theme: z.record(z.string(), z.any()).optional(),
121	      plugins: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
122	    })
123	    .optional(),
124	})
125	
126	export const registryItemCssVarsSchema = z.object({
127	  theme: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
128	  light: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
129	  dark: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
130	})
131	
132	// Recursive type for CSS properties that supports empty objects at any level.
133	const cssValueSchema: z.ZodType<any> = z.lazy(() =>
134	  z.union([
135	    z.string(),
136	    z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.string(), z.string())])),
137	    z.record(z.string(), cssValueSchema),

139	)
140	
141	export const registryItemCssSchema = z.record(z.string(), cssValueSchema)
142	
143	export const registryItemEnvVarsSchema = z.record(z.string(), z.string())
144	
145	// Font metadata schema for registry:font items.
146	export const registryItemFontSchema = z.object({
147	  family: z.string(),
148	  provider: z.literal("google"),
149	  import: z.string(),
150	  variable: z.string(),
151	  weight: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
152	  subsets: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
153	  selector: z.string().optional(),
154	  dependency: z.string().optional(),
155	})
156	
157	// Common fields shared by all registry items.
158	export const registryItemCommonSchema = z.object({
159	  $schema: z.string().optional(),
160	  extends: z.string().optional(),
161	  name: z.string(),
162	  title: z.string().optional(),
163	  author: z.string().min(2).optional(),
164	  description: z.string().optional(),
165	  dependencies: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
166	  devDependencies: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
167	  registryDependencies: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
168	  files: z.array(registryItemFileSchema).optional(),
169	  tailwind: registryItemTailwindSchema.optional(),
170	  cssVars: registryItemCssVarsSchema.optional(),
171	  css: registryItemCssSchema.optional(),
172	  envVars: registryItemEnvVarsSchema.optional(),
173	  meta: z.record(z.string(), z.any()).optional(),
174	  docs: z.string().optional(),
175	  categories: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
176	})
177	
178	// registry:base has a config field, registry:font has a font field.
179	export const registryItemSchema = z.discriminatedUnion("type", [
180	  registryItemCommonSchema.extend({
181	    type: z.literal("registry:base"),
182	    config: rawConfigSchema.deepPartial().optional(),
183	  }),
184	  registryItemCommonSchema.extend({
185	    type: z.literal("registry:font"),
186	    font: registryItemFontSchema,
187	  }),
188	  registryItemCommonSchema.extend({
189	    type: registryItemTypeSchema.exclude(["registry:base", "registry:font"]),
190	  }),
191	])
192	
193	export type RegistryItem = z.infer<typeof registryItemSchema>
194	
195	// Helper type for registry:base items specifically.
196	export type RegistryBaseItem = Extract<RegistryItem, { type: "registry:base" }>
197	
198	// Helper type for registry:font items specifically.
199	export type RegistryFontItem = Extract<RegistryItem, { type: "registry:font" }>
200	
201	export const registrySchema = z.object({
202	  name: z.string(),
203	  homepage: z.string(),
204	  items: z.array(registryItemSchema),
205	})
206	
207	export type Registry = z.infer<typeof registrySchema>
208	
209	export const registryIndexSchema = z.array(registryItemSchema)
210	
211	export const stylesSchema = z.array(
212	  z.object({
213	    name: z.string(),
214	    label: z.string(),
215	  })
216	)
217	
218	export const iconsSchema = z.record(
219	  z.string(),
220	  z.record(z.string(), z.string())
221	)
222	
223	export const registryBaseColorSchema = z.object({
224	  inlineColors: z.object({
225	    light: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
226	    dark: z.record(z.string(), z.string()),
227	  }),
228	  cssVars: registryItemCssVarsSchema,
229	  cssVarsV4: registryItemCssVarsSchema.optional(),
230	  inlineColorsTemplate: z.string(),
231	  cssVarsTemplate: z.string(),
232	})
233	
234	export const registryResolvedItemsTreeSchema = registryItemCommonSchema
235	  .pick({
236	    dependencies: true,
237	    devDependencies: true,
238	    files: true,
239	    tailwind: true,
240	    cssVars: true,
241	    css: true,
242	    envVars: true,
243	    docs: true,
244	  })
245	  .extend({
246	    fonts: z
247	      .array(
248	        registryItemCommonSchema.extend({
249	          type: z.literal("registry:font"),
250	          font: registryItemFontSchema,
251	        })
252	      )
253	      .optional(),
254	  })
255	
256	export const searchResultItemSchema = z.object({
257	  name: z.string(),
258	  type: z.string().optional(),
259	  description: z.string().optional(),
260	  registry: z.string(),
261	  addCommandArgument: z.string(),
262	})
263	
264	export const searchResultsSchema = z.object({
265	  pagination: z.object({
266	    total: z.number(),
267	    offset: z.number(),
268	    limit: z.number(),
269	    hasMore: z.boolean(),
270	  }),
271	  items: z.array(searchResultItemSchema),
272	})
273	
274	// Legacy schema for getRegistriesIndex() backward compatibility.
275	export const registriesIndexSchema = z.record(
276	  z.string().regex(/^@[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9-_]*$/),
277	  z.string()
278	)
279

281	export const registriesSchema = z.array(

283	    name: z.string(),
284	    homepage: z.string().optional(),
285	    url: z.string(),
286	    description: z.string().optional(),
287	  })
288	)
289	
290	export const presetSchema = z.object({
291	  name: z.string(),
292	  title: z.string(),
293	  description: z.string(),
294	  base: z.string(),
295	  style: z.string(),
296	  baseColor: z.string(),
297	  theme: z.string(),
298	  iconLibrary: z.string(),
299	  font: z.string(),
300	  rtl: z.coerce.boolean().default(false),
301	  menuAccent: z.enum(["subtle", "bold"]),
302	  menuColor: z.enum([
303	    "default",
304	    "inverted",
305	    "default-translucent",
306	    "inverted-translucent",

309	})
310

312

315	})

1	import { BUILTIN_REGISTRIES, FALLBACK_STYLE } from "@/src/registry/constants"
2	import { configSchema } from "@/src/schema"
3	import { Config, createConfig, DeepPartial } from "@/src/utils/get-config"
4	import deepmerge from "deepmerge"
5	
6	function resolveStyleFromConfig(config: DeepPartial<Config>) {
7	  if (!config.style) {
8	    return FALLBACK_STYLE
9	  }
10	
11	  // Check if we should use new-york-v4 for Tailwind v4.
12	  // We assume that if tailwind.config is empty, we're using Tailwind v4.
13	  if (config.style === "new-york" && config.tailwind?.config === "") {
14	    return FALLBACK_STYLE
15	  }
16	
17	  return config.style
18	}
19	
20	export function configWithDefaults(config?: DeepPartial<Config>) {
21	  const baseConfig = createConfig({
22	    style: FALLBACK_STYLE,
23	    registries: BUILTIN_REGISTRIES,
24	  })
25	
26	  if (!config) {
27	    return baseConfig
28	  }
29	
30	  return configSchema.parse(
31	    deepmerge(baseConfig, {
32	      ...config,
33	      style: resolveStyleFromConfig(config),
34	      registries: { ...BUILTIN_REGISTRIES, ...config.registries },
35	    })

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive report: ## Summary of shadcn/ui Demo/Example Structure Based on my exploration of this shadcn/ui project, here's the complete structure for demo files: ### 1. **Location of Example Files** Examples are stored in: - **Primary location**: `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/` (or `/radix/examples/` for Radix variant) - **Naming convention**: `{component-name}-example.tsx` (e.g., `tabs-example.tsx`, `button-example.tsx`, `accordion-example.tsx`) ### 2. **Example File Format** All examples follow a consistent pattern: **Full file path**: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/tabs-example.tsx` **Key characteristics**: - **Default export**: Each file exports a default function component named `{ComponentName}Example` - **Wrapper components**: Uses `ExampleWrapper` (container) and `Example` (individual demo) components - **Client component**: Optional `"use client"` directive at top (required for stateful examples like Dialog, Drawer) - **Imports path**: `@/registry/bases/base/ui/{component}` and `@/registry/bases/base/components/example` ### 3. **Example Component Wrapper Architecture** **File**: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/components/example.tsx` **ExampleWrapper component**: ```tsx function ExampleWrapper({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) { return (
) } ``` **Example component**: ```tsx function Example({ title, children, className, containerClassName, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & { title?: string containerClassName?: string }) { return (
{title && (
{title}
)}
{children}
) } ``` ### 4. **Naming Conventions** - **File name**: `{component}-example.tsx` - **Default export function**: `export default function {ComponentName}Example()` - **Variant functions**: `function {ComponentName}{Variant}()` (e.g., `TabsBasic`, `TabsLine`, `TabsDisabled`) - **Title prop**: Displayed above each demo (e.g., `title="Basic"`, `title="With Content"`) ### 5. **Demo Pattern Examples** **Tabs Example** (Full file: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/tabs-example.tsx`): - Multiple variant functions (TabsBasic, TabsLine, TabsVariantsComparison, etc.) - Each wrapped in `Example` component with title - All variants returned inside `ExampleWrapper` from default export - State management: Some examples use React hooks for stateful components **Accordion Example** (Full file: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/accordion-example.tsx`): - 5 main demos: Basic, Multiple, WithBorders, InCard, WithDisabled - Uses data mapping for accordion items - Supports complex content including nested JSX **Dialog Example** (Full file: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/dialog-example.tsx`): - Requires `"use client"` directive - 5 variant functions with state management - Demonstrates form integration with Field components **Drawer Example** (Full file: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/drawer-example.tsx`): - Requires `"use client"` directive - 2 variants with dynamic rendering - Shows scrollable content patterns **Button Example** (Full file: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/button-example.tsx`): - 6 major demo sections - Each section demonstrates variants and sizes - Uses IconPlaceholder component for multi-icon-set support ### 6. **Import Patterns** Standard imports for examples: ```tsx import { Example, ExampleWrapper, } from "@/registry/bases/base/components/example" import { ComponentName } from "@/registry/bases/base/ui/{component-name}" import { IconPlaceholder } from "@/app/(create)/components/icon-placeholder" ``` ### 7. **How Demos Are Indexed and Rendered** **Auto-generated index file**: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/examples/__index__.tsx` - Auto-generated by `scripts/build-registry.mts` - Uses `React.lazy()` for code splitting - Each example exported with lazy loading - Maps component name to default export **Layout location**: `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/app/(app)/examples/layout.tsx` - Provides navigation and theme switching - Uses ExamplesNav component for navigation - Renders children within a standardized page layout - Each example page lives in subdirectories (e.g., `/playground`, `/dashboard`, `/authentication`, `/tasks`) ### 8. **For Creating a Stepper Demo** Based on this pattern, you should create: **File**: `apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/stepper-example.tsx` **Structure**: ```tsx "use client" import { Example, ExampleWrapper, } from "@/registry/bases/base/components/example" import { Stepper } from "@/registry/bases/base/ui/stepper" // ... other imports export default function StepperExample() { return ( {/* ... more variants */} ) } function StepperBasic() { return ( {/* Stepper component and content */} ) } // ... more variant functions ``` Key points: - Use `"use client"` if the stepper needs state management - Group related variants together - Each variant gets its own titled `Example` wrapper - All variants returned from the main default export wrapped in `ExampleWrapper` - Naming: `stepper-example.tsx` → `export default function StepperExample()`

- Do demos use specific wrapper components?
- What imports do demos use - do they import from `@/components/ui/...` or local paths?

Report full file paths and full file contents for the examples you find.

Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a summary document:

## Overall Structure of the shadcn/ui Component Library

Based on my exploration, here's the complete structure breakdown:

### 1. **ROOT DIRECTORY STRUCTURE**

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs`

**Key Folders:**
- `apps/v4/` - Main documentation/showcase application (Next.js)
- `packages/shadcn/` - The core CLI package
- `packages/tests/` - Test suite
- `templates/` - Starter templates
- `skills/` - Agent-related skills

**Key Config Files at Root:**
- `package.json` - Monorepo setup (pnpm workspaces)
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `turbo.json` - Turborepo configuration
- `pnpm-workspace.yaml` - pnpm workspace config

### 2. **THE REGISTRY SYSTEM - HOW IT WORKS**

The registry system is sophisticated and multi-layered:

#### **Schema Definition**
**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/packages/shadcn/src/registry/schema.ts`

This defines the `RegistryItem` schema which includes:
```typescript
registryItemTypeSchema = enum[
  "registry:lib",
  "registry:block",
  "registry:component",
  "registry:ui",
  "registry:hook",
  "registry:page",
  "registry:file",
  "registry:theme",
  "registry:style",
  "registry:item",
  "registry:base",
  "registry:font",
  "registry:example",
  "registry:internal"
]
```

Each item has:
- `name`: component identifier
- `type`: registry type (above)
- `dependencies`: npm packages needed
- `devDependencies`: dev-only npm packages
- `registryDependencies`: references to other registry items
- `files`: array of file objects with path and type
- `tailwind`: optional Tailwind config
- `cssVars`: CSS variables (light/dark/theme)
- `css`: CSS properties
- `envVars`: environment variables
- `docs`: markdown documentation
- `categories`: categorization tags

#### **Registry Files Structure**
**Main Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/`

Files generated/organized:
1. **registry.json** - Master registry with all items
2. **directory.json** - Directory of registries (external registries index)
3. **__index__.tsx** - Compiled index (1MB+)
4. **__blocks__.json** - Blocks metadata

#### **Per-Style Registries**
**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/`

Each style has subdirectories:
- `ui/` - UI components
- `examples/` - Example implementations
- `blocks/` - Full-page blocks/templates
- `charts/` - Chart components
- `hooks/` - React hooks
- `internal/` - Internal components
- `lib/` - Utility functions

Each subdirectory contains:
- Component TypeScript files (e.g., `accordion.tsx`)
- **_registry.ts** - Registry definition file

### 3. **REGISTRY DEFINITION FILES FORMAT**

**Example: UI Components Registry**
**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/_registry.ts`

```typescript
import { type Registry } from "shadcn/schema"

export const ui: Registry["items"] = [
  {
    name: "accordion",
    type: "registry:ui",
    dependencies: ["radix-ui"],
    files: [
      {
        path: "ui/accordion.tsx",
        type: "registry:ui",
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    name: "sidebar",
    type: "registry:ui",
    dependencies: ["radix-ui", "class-variance-authority", "lucide-react"],
    registryDependencies: [
      "button",
      "separator",
      "sheet",
      "tooltip",
      "input",
      "use-mobile",
      "skeleton",
    ],
    files: [
      {
        path: "ui/sidebar.tsx",
        type: "registry:ui",
      },
    ],
    tailwind: {
      config: {
        theme: {
          extend: {
            colors: {
              sidebar: {
                DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--sidebar-background))",
                foreground: "hsl(var(--sidebar-foreground))",
                // ... more colors
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    cssVars: {
      light: {
        "sidebar-background": "0 0% 98%",
        "sidebar-foreground": "240 5.3% 26.1%",
        // ... more vars
      },
      dark: {
        "sidebar-background": "240 5.9% 10%",
        "sidebar-foreground": "240 4.8% 95.9%",
        // ... more vars
      },
    },
  },
  // ... more items
]
```

**Example: Examples Registry**
**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/examples/_registry.ts`

```typescript
export const examples: Registry["items"] = [
  {
    name: "accordion-demo",
    type: "registry:example",
    registryDependencies: ["accordion"],
    files: [
      {
        path: "examples/accordion-demo.tsx",
        type: "registry:example",
      },
    ],
  },
  // ... more examples
]
```

**Example: Blocks Registry**
**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/blocks/_registry.ts`

```typescript
export const blocks: Registry["items"] = [
  {
    name: "dashboard-01",
    type: "registry:block",
    description: "A dashboard with sidebar, charts and data table.",
    dependencies: [
      "@dnd-kit/core",
      "@dnd-kit/modifiers",
      "@tanstack/react-table",
      "zod",
    ],
    registryDependencies: [
      "sidebar",
      "breadcrumb",
      "separator",
      "chart",
      "card",
      "table",
      // ... more dependencies
    ],
    files: [
      {
        path: "blocks/dashboard-01/page.tsx",
        type: "registry:page",
        target: "app/dashboard/page.tsx",
      },
      {
        path: "blocks/dashboard-01/data.json",
        type: "registry:file",
        target: "app/dashboard/data.json",
      },
      {
        path: "blocks/dashboard-01/components/app-sidebar.tsx",
        type: "registry:component",
      },
      // ... more files
    ],
    categories: ["dashboard"],
    meta: {
      iframeHeight: "1000px",
    },
  },
  // ... more blocks
]
```

### 4. **COMPONENTS.JSON (Project Config)**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/components.json`

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
  "style": "new-york",
  "rsc": true,
  "tsx": true,
  "tailwind": {
    "config": "",
    "css": "app/globals.css",
    "baseColor": "neutral",
    "cssVariables": true,
    "prefix": ""
  },
  "aliases": {
    "components": "@/components",
    "utils": "@/lib/utils",
    "ui": "@/registry/new-york-v4/ui",
    "lib": "@/lib",
    "hooks": "@/hooks"
  },
  "iconLibrary": "lucide"
}
```

This tells the CLI:
- Which style to use (new-york-v4)
- Where files should be installed
- Aliases for imports
- Tailwind configuration location

### 5. **REGISTRY API & RESOLVER**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/packages/shadcn/src/registry/api.ts`

Key functions:
- `getRegistry(name)` - Fetch registry by name
- `getRegistryItems(items)` - Get specific items
- `resolveRegistryItems(items)` - Resolve with dependencies
- `getShadcnRegistryIndex()` - Get all available components
- `getRegistryStyles()` - Get available styles
- `getRegistryBaseColors()` - Get color schemes

### 6. **CONSTANTS & BUILT-IN REGISTRIES**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/packages/shadcn/src/registry/constants.ts`

```typescript
export const REGISTRY_URL = "https://ui.shadcn.com/r"
export const FALLBACK_STYLE = "new-york-v4"
export const BUILTIN_REGISTRIES = {
  "@shadcn": `${REGISTRY_URL}/styles/{style}/{name}.json`,
}
```

Supports custom registries via `components.json`:
```json
{
  "registries": {
    "@acme": "https://acme.com/r/{style}/{name}.json",
    "@v0": "https://v0.dev/r/{name}.json"
  }
}
```

### 7. **AVAILABLE UI COMPONENTS LIST**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/lib/components.ts`

Contains 60+ UI components:
accordion, alert, alert-dialog, aspect-ratio, avatar, badge, breadcrumb, button, button-group, calendar, card, carousel, chart, checkbox, collapsible, combobox, command, context-menu, data-table, date-picker, dialog, direction, drawer, dropdown-menu, empty, field, form, hover-card, input, input-group, input-otp, item, kbd, label, menubar, native-select, navigation-menu, pagination, popover, progress, radio-group, resizable, scroll-area, select, separator, sheet, sidebar, skeleton, slider, sonner, spinner, switch, table, tabs, textarea, toast, toggle, toggle-group, tooltip, typography

### 8. **STYLES & THEMES**

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/styles/`

Available style CSS files:
- style-luma.css
- style-lyra.css
- style-maia.css
- style-mira.css
- style-nova.css
- style-vega.css

**Base Colors:** neutral, zinc, stone, mauve, olive, mist, taupe

**Theme CSS Variables:** `cssVars` with light/dark mode support

### 9. **REGISTRY BUILD PROCESS**

**From apps/v4/package.json:**
```bash
"registry:build": "pnpm --filter=shadcn build && bun run ./scripts/build-registry.mts"
```

The build:
1. Builds the shadcn CLI package
2. Runs the registry build script which:
   - Collects all _registry.ts files from each style directory
   - Merges them into unified registry.json
   - Creates directory.json index
   - Generates __index__.tsx
   - Creates __blocks__.json metadata

### 10. **EXTERNAL REGISTRIES INDEX**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5zvs/apps/v4/registry/directory.json`

Contains registry metadata for external registries like:
- @8bitcn
- @acme
- @cruip
- @v0
- And many others

Each entry has name, homepage, url, description, and logo.

---

## Key Takeaways

1. **Modular Design:** Each style (new-york-v4, etc.) has its own subdirectories with _registry.ts files
2. **Declarative Format:** Components are registered using TypeScript objects with clear schema
3. **Dependency Resolution:** Both NPM dependencies and registry dependencies are tracked
4. **Flexible Configuration:** Users customize via components.json
5. **Multi-Registry Support:** Can reference components from multiple registries
6. **Type Safety:** Full Zod schema validation for all registry items
7. **CSS Variables:** Theme customization via CSS variables with light/dark support
8. **Tailwind Integration:** Seamless Tailwind config extension support

- `getRegistryBaseColors()` - Get color schemes

### 6. **CONSTANTS & BUILT-IN REGISTRIES**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/packages/shadcn/src/registry/constants.ts`

```typescript
export const REGISTRY_URL = "https://ui.shadcn.com/r"
export const FALLBACK_STYLE = "new-york-v4"
export const BUILTIN_REGISTRIES = {
  "@shadcn": `${REGISTRY_URL}/styles/{style}/{name}.json`,
}
```

Supports custom registries via `components.json`:
```json
{
  "registries": {
    "@acme": "https://acme.com/r/{style}/{name}.json",
    "@v0": "https://v0.dev/r/{name}.json"
  }
}
```

### 7. **AVAILABLE UI COMPONENTS LIST**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/lib/components.ts`

Contains 60+ UI components:
accordion, alert, alert-dialog, aspect-ratio, avatar, badge, breadcrumb, button, button-group, calendar, card, carousel, chart, checkbox, collapsible, combobox, command, context-menu, data-table, date-picker, dialog, direction, drawer, dropdown-menu, empty, field, form, hover-card, input, input-group, input-otp, item, kbd, label, menubar, native-select, navigation-menu, pagination, popover, progress, radio-group, resizable, scroll-area, select, separator, sheet, sidebar, skeleton, slider, sonner, spinner, switch, table, tabs, textarea, toast, toggle, toggle-group, tooltip, typography

### 8. **STYLES & THEMES**

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/styles/`

Available style CSS files:
- style-luma.css
- style-lyra.css
- style-maia.css
- style-mira.css
- style-nova.css
- style-vega.css

**Base Colors:** neutral, zinc, stone, mauve, olive, mist, taupe

**Theme CSS Variables:** `cssVars` with light/dark mode support

### 9. **REGISTRY BUILD PROCESS**

**From apps/v4/package.json:**
```bash
"registry:build": "pnpm --filter=shadcn build && bun run ./scripts/build-registry.mts"
```

The build:
1. Builds the shadcn CLI package
2. Runs the registry build script which:
   - Collects all _registry.ts files from each style directory
   - Merges them into unified registry.json
   - Creates directory.json index
   - Generates __index__.tsx
   - Creates __blocks__.json metadata

### 10. **EXTERNAL REGISTRIES INDEX**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5zvs/apps/v4/registry/directory.json`

Contains registry metadata for external registries like:
- @8bitcn
- @acme
- @cruip
- @v0
- And many others

Each entry has name, homepage, url, description, and logo.

---

## Key Takeaways

1. **Modular Design:** Each style (new-york-v4, etc.) has its own subdirectories with _registry.ts files
2. **Declarative Format:** Components are registered using TypeScript objects with clear schema
3. **Dependency Resolution:** Both NPM dependencies and registry dependencies are tracked
4. **Flexible Configuration:** Users customize via components.json
5. **Multi-Registry Support:** Can reference components from multiple registries
6. **Type Safety:** Full Zod schema validation for all registry items
7. **CSS Variables:** Theme customization via CSS variables with light/dark support
8. **Tailwind Integration:** Seamless Tailwind config extension support

Perfect! Now let me provide you with a comprehensive report on the registry structure.

## Registry Structure Report for Stepper Component

Based on my thorough exploration of the shadcn/ui v4 registry, here are the exact details you need:

### 1. Registry Directory Structure

**Top-level `/apps/v4/registry/`:**
```
├── __blocks__.json
├── __index__.tsx
├── base-colors.ts
├── bases/ (main directory for component libraries)
├── bases.ts
├── config.ts
├── directory.json
├── fonts.ts
├── icons/ (icon sets)
├── new-york-v4/ (theme implementation)
├── styles/ (styling configuration)
├── styles.tsx
└── themes.ts
```

### 2. `/apps/v4/registry/bases/` Structure

```
bases/
├── base/ (BaseUI implementation)
└── radix/ (Radix UI implementation)
```

### 3. `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/` Structure

This is where you'll create your Stepper component:

```
base/
├── blocks/ (32 block components)
├── components/ (helper components like example wrapper)
├── examples/ (62 example files)
├── hooks/ (shared hooks)
├── internal/ (internal utilities)
├── lib/ (shared utilities)
├── ui/ (59 UI components)
└── registry.ts (main registry index file)
```

### 4. `/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/` Structure

If you need theme-specific styling:

```
new-york-v4/
├── blocks/ (30 blocks)
├── charts/ (73 chart components)
├── examples/ (237 example files)
├── hooks/
├── internal/
├── lib/
├── ui/ (59 UI components)
└── registry.ts
```

### 5. Full Contents of `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/registry.ts`

```typescript
import { registryItemSchema, type Registry } from "shadcn/schema"
import { z } from "zod"

import { fonts } from "@/registry/fonts"

import { blocks } from "./blocks/_registry"
import { components } from "./components/_registry"
import { examples } from "./examples/_registry"
import { hooks } from "./hooks/_registry"
import { internal } from "./internal/_registry"
import { lib } from "./lib/_registry"
import { ui } from "./ui/_registry"

// Shared between index and style.
const BASE_STYLE = {
  type: "registry:style",
  dependencies: ["class-variance-authority", "lucide-react", "@base-ui/react"],
  devDependencies: ["tw-animate-css", "shadcn"],
  registryDependencies: ["utils"],
  css: {
    '@import "tw-animate-css"': {},
    '@import "shadcn/tailwind.css"': {},
    "@layer base": {
      "*": {
        "@apply border-border outline-ring/50": {},
      },
      body: {
        "@apply bg-background text-foreground": {},
      },
    },
  },
  cssVars: {},
  files: [],
}

export const registry = {
  name: "shadcn/ui",
  homepage: "https://ui.shadcn.com",
  items: z.array(registryItemSchema).parse([
    {
      name: "index",
      ...BASE_STYLE,
    },
    {
      name: "style",
      ...BASE_STYLE,
    },
    ...ui,
    ...examples,
    ...lib,
    ...components,
    ...blocks,
    ...hooks,
    ...internal,
    ...fonts,
  ]),
} satisfies Registry
```

### 6. UI Registry Entry Format

From `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/_registry.ts` (spanning 1025 lines with 59+ components):

**Pattern for simple components:**
```typescript
{
  name: "accordion",
  type: "registry:ui",
  files: [
    {
      path: "ui/accordion.tsx",
      type: "registry:ui",
    },
  ],
  meta: {
    links: {
      docs: "https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/base/accordion",
      examples: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shadcn-ui/ui/refs/heads/main/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/accordion-example.tsx",
      api: "https://base-ui.com/react/components/accordion.md",
    },
  },
}
```

**Pattern for components with dependencies:**
```typescript
{
  name: "carousel",
  type: "registry:ui",
  files: [
    {
      path: "ui/carousel.tsx",
      type: "registry:ui",
    },
  ],
  registryDependencies: ["button"],
  dependencies: ["embla-carousel-react"],
  meta: {
    links: {
      docs: "https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/base/carousel",
      examples: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shadcn-ui/ui/refs/heads/main/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/carousel-example.tsx",
      api: "https://www.embla-carousel.com/get-started/react",
    },
  },
}
```

### 7. Examples Registry Entry Format

From `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/_registry.ts` (spanning 908 lines):

```typescript
{
  name: "accordion-example",
  title: "Accordion",
  type: "registry:example",
  registryDependencies: ["accordion", "button", "card", "example"],
  files: [
    {
      path: "examples/accordion-example.tsx",
      type: "registry:example",
    },
  ],
}
```

### 8. Example Component File Patterns

**tabs-example.tsx** (360 lines):
- Uses `ExampleWrapper` component to wrap multiple `Example` showcase components
- Each showcase is a separate function demonstrating different variations
- Imports UI components from `@/registry/bases/base/ui/`
- Imports helper `Example` component for consistent styling

**accordion-example.tsx** (337 lines):
- Similar pattern with `ExampleWrapper`
- Five different accordion variations (Basic, Multiple, With Borders, In Card, With Disabled)
- Demonstrates compound components (Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent)

### 9. Carousel Component Structure (Complex Compound Component)

**carousel.tsx** (257 lines):
- Uses React Context for state management (`CarouselContext`)
- Custom hook pattern (`useCarousel()`)
- Compound component exports: `Carousel`, `CarouselContent`, `CarouselItem`, `CarouselPrevious`, `CarouselNext`
- Type definitions at top: `CarouselApi`, `CarouselContextProps`, `CarouselProps`, `CarouselOptions`
- Integrates external library: `embla-carousel-react`
- Uses utility functions like `cn()` for className management

### 10. Stepper Component Search Results

No existing "stepper" component found in the codebase. You're starting fresh!

### File Paths to Create for Stepper

To create a complete Stepper component, you'll need to create/modify these files:

1. **UI Component:**
   - `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/stepper.tsx`

2. **Example:**
   - `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/stepper-example.tsx`

3. **Registry Entry in UI:**
   - Add entry to `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/_registry.ts`

4. **Registry Entry in Examples:**
   - Add entry to `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/_registry.ts`

### Registry Entry Template for Stepper

Based on the patterns observed, your Stepper entry should follow this structure:

**In `ui/_registry.ts` (add to the array):**
```typescript
{
  name: "stepper",
  type: "registry:ui",
  registryDependencies: ["button"], // or whatever components it needs
  files: [
    {
      path: "ui/stepper.tsx",
      type: "registry:ui",
    },
  ],
  meta: {
```

```
bases/

```

### 3. `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/` Structure

This is where you'll create your Stepper component:

```
base/
├── blocks/ (32 block components)
├── components/ (helper components like example wrapper)

├── hooks/ (shared hooks)
├── internal/ (internal utilities)
├── lib/ (shared utilities)
├── ui/ (59 UI components)
└── registry.ts (main registry index file)
```

### 4. `/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/` Structure

If you need theme-specific styling:

```
new-york-v4/
├── blocks/ (30 blocks)
├── charts/ (73 chart components)
├── examples/ (237 example files)
├── hooks/
├── internal/
├── lib/
├── ui/ (59 UI components)
└── registry.ts
```

### 5. Full Contents of `/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/registry.ts`

```typescript
import { registryItemSchema, type Registry } from "shadcn/schema"
import { z } from "zod"

import { fonts } from "@/registry/fonts"

import { blocks } from "./blocks/_registry"
import { components } from "./components/_registry"
import { examples } from "./examples/_registry"
import { hooks } from "./hooks/_registry"
import { internal } from "./internal/_registry"
import { lib } from "./lib/_registry"
import { ui } from "./ui/_registry"

// Shared between index and style.
const BASE_STYLE = {
  type: "registry:style",
  dependencies: ["class-variance-authority", "lucide-react", "@base-ui/react"],
  devDependencies: ["tw-animate-css", "shadcn"],
  registryDependencies: ["utils"],
  css: {
    '@import "tw-animate-css"': {},
    '@import "shadcn/tailwind.css"': {},
    "@layer base": {
      "*": {
        "@apply border-border outline-ring/50": {},
      },
      body: {
        "@apply bg-background text-foreground": {},
      },
    },
  },
  cssVars: {},
  files: [],
}

export const registry = {
  name: "shadcn/ui",
  homepage: "https://ui.shadcn.com",
  items: z.array(registryItemSchema).parse([
    {
      name: "index",
      ...BASE_STYLE,
    },
    {
      name: "style",
      ...BASE_STYLE,
    },
    ...ui,
    ...examples,
    ...lib,
    ...components,
    ...blocks,
    ...hooks,
    ...internal,
    ...fonts,
  ]),
} satisfies Registry
```

```typescript
  meta: {
    links: {
```

### 2. **Breadcrumb Component (Compound Component)**
**File Path:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/breadcrumb.tsx`

A well-structured compound component with:

- `BreadcrumbItem` (li element)
- `BreadcrumbLink` (a element with render prop)
- `BreadcrumbPage` (current page indicator)

- `BreadcrumbEllipsis` (for collapsing items)

All components use `data-slot` attributes for CSS targeting and `cn()` utility for class merging.

### 3. **Pagination Component (Horizontal Navigation Pattern)**
**File Path:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775473781853-fs5vzs/apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/pagination.tsx`

Horizontally-oriented compound component with:

- `PaginationContent` (ul element)
- `PaginationItem` (li wrapper)
- `PaginationLink` (Button-based link with isActive state)
- `PaginationPrevious` (Previous button with icon)
- `PaginationNext` (Next button with icon)
